label: PeripheralAgent V2

actions: No USB devices plugged in during run (no hardware available)
USB inventory probe fired every cycle with device_count=0
system_profiler SPUSBDataType executed successfully each cycle
trigger_run.note: Inventory probe confirms collector works. Connect/disconnect, storage, HID, Bluetooth, network-adapter probes require physical USB/BT hardware to fire.

fixes_applied: setup(): cert check changed from return False to logger.warning() (dev mode tolerant)
_events_to_telemetry(): removed non-existent PeripheralTelemetry, USBDevice, AlertData, alerts proto refs
collect_data(): merged with _events_to_telemetry(); always returns DeviceTelemetry with heartbeat METRIC
collect_data(): probe events use SecurityEvent sub-messages with mitre_techniques, attributes map, confidence_score
validate_event(): changed from event.timestamp to event.timestamp_ns
dark_spots: 6/7 probes require physical USB/Bluetooth hardware to trigger (connect, storage, HID, Bluetooth, network, risk-score)
No Thunderbolt monitoring (macOS Thunderbolt peripherals not covered)
No USB firmware analysis (BadUSB detection is heuristic only)
